title: Bentley–McIlroy Compression Algorithm
description: A C++17 implementation of the Bentley–McIlroy algorithm for lossless compression based on long repeated substrings.

title: MiniHack Evolution
description: Training evolutionary agents in NetHack environments via OpenAI Gym, using genetic algorithms to learn strategies in a 15×15 gridworld.

title: Parallel and Distributed Implementations
description: Parallel and distributed implementations of well-known algorithms, including MergeSort, Softmax, and compression with Miniz.

title: Sentiment Analysis on Amazon Reviews
description: Automatic sentiment classification using large language models and topic modeling to identify recurring negative themes, with applications to user experience and brand reputation analysis.
